Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Robert Fletcher, Esq., for Tommy Bui, Administrator.

Counsel reports that a petition is pending in the court's e-filing queue, which is confirmed by the clerk.

The matter is continued to Jun-25-2025 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported

***After hearing (Jun-11-2025): the court notes that the petition mentioned above has been filed with a hearing date on Aug-19-2025. Accordingly, this matter will not be continued as stated above and will be taken off calendar instead.
